overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a narrow neon-lit market alley transitioning to a bright, busy futuristic city street with heavy traffic and distinctive East Asian-inspired cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk market alley with food stalls and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow market alley observing vendors and a distinctive tattooed NPC

notable_agents.action: tattooed cyberpunk woman with glowing chest implant drinking from a can
customer in bright pink pants browsing at the food stall counter

entered.detail: heavily tattooed woman with cybernetic implants and glowing pink chest piece
string of traditional red paper lanterns hanging above the stall
yellow canvas canopy over market stall with various goods
bright red automated vending machine with glowing interface
scattered cardboard boxes and construction debris along the alley wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, shadowy cyberpunk market alley. A tattooed NPC with glowing cybernetic implants stands prominently drinking from a can while red lanterns hang above a food stall. The ground is concrete with scattered debris, and the atmosphere is illuminated by artificial neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market corridor with drink vendors and graffiti walls

events.description: passing from neon-lit stall area into darker corridor with steam vents

agents.ego_description: moving past drink vendors and customers in the covered market corridor

notable_agents.action: vendor woman standing behind the drink counter with apron
woman in purple jacket leaning against graffiti wall using her phone

entered.detail: long metal counter with various bottles and serving equipment
tall refrigerator unit with blue glowing interior light
NPC in distinctive purple outfit standing near the wall
wall covered in green spray paint graffiti and tags
steam rising from floor vents creating atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the covered market corridor, passing a drink vendor stall with a glowing refrigerator. A woman in a purple jacket stands against a graffiti-covered wall. The lighting shifts as the camera moves past the bright stall into a darker area with steam vents.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell transitioning from indoor market to street level

events.description: beginning ascent of concrete stairs toward street exit
emerging from dark interior into bright daylight at street level

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs toward the street level exit

notable_agents.action: muscular man in white tank top and gloves descending the stairs
person in dark clothing standing at the top of the stairwell

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward
black arcade cabinet with glowing red and white signage
blue neon arrow sign pointing direction on the wall
large open doorway leading to bright exterior street

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and ascends a concrete stairwell, transitioning from the enclosed market to the street level. Other NPCs are seen descending the stairs. An arcade machine sits against the right wall, and bright daylight becomes visible through the exit doorway at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with traditional-futuristic architecture mix

events.description: exiting covered stairwell into bright open city street with heavy traffic
red sports car with gold wheels drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: walking along busy urban street with heavy traffic and futuristic architecture

notable_agents.action: teal sedan driving along the multi-lane road
red sports car with distinctive gold alloy wheels passing by

entered.detail: multi-tiered pagoda-style structure with curved roofs mixed with cyberpunk elements
massive concrete elevated highway and monorail system overhead
tall glass and steel building with industrial smokestacks emitting steam
distinctive teal-green high-rise with multiple balconies and neon accents
large rotating cylindrical billboard with advertisements mounted above the temple

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a bright, bustling futuristic city street with heavy traffic. A distinctive traditional temple structure with curved roofs sits beneath an elevated monorail track, surrounded by towering cyberpunk skyscrapers including a notable green glass building. Vehicles including a teal sedan and red sports car drive past on the multi-lane road under clear midday skies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowy, neon-lit market alley into the blinding brightness of a bustling futuristic city street. It begins in a narrow corridor beneath red lanterns, passing a tattooed NPC with glowing implants and a food stall amidst scattered concrete debris. As the camera moves deeper into the covered market, it glides past a glowing drink refrigerator and a woman in a purple jacket before passing through a dark area filled with steam vents. The scene then shifts as the camera ascends a concrete stairwell past an arcade machine, with the enclosed atmosphere giving way to bright daylight at the exit. Finally, the view opens onto a wide multi-lane road under clear midday skies, where a teal sedan and red sports car drive past a traditional temple structure nestled beneath an elevated monorail and towering green glass skyscrapers.
